channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: The Ota Skill for AI Agents
item.description: Overview We built the Ota skill because too much "AI repo automation" is still fake confidence. An agent clones a repo, finds a plausible command, edits the right file, and looks smart right up...

item.title: The Algorithmic Yes-Man: Why AI Constantly Agrees with You
item.description: It can feel a bit eerie when an artificial intelligence system effortlessly nods along with your ideas, validates an unconventional opinion, or gently agrees with a shaky premise you threw out on...

item.title: How to Measure Code Coverage in C++ with Visual Studio 2026
item.description: About My Code I'm developing a video game in C++ using SDL3 — a cross-platform library that provides access to accelerated video, audio, controllers, and more. As part of development, I'm writing...

item.title: I Built a Complete AI Infrastructure Stack from Scratch — Here's What I Learned
item.description: I Built a Complete AI Infrastructure Stack from Scratch — Here's What I Learned Most AI projects start at the top of the stack. You grab an LLM API, wire up a vector database, build a RAG...

item.title: TypeScript and frontend forms: small details that build user trust | Rizwan Saleem
item.description: TypeScript and frontend forms: small details that build user trust A form is one of the easiest parts of a product to underestimate. It can look simple in a design file: labels, inputs,...

item.title: I built a GitHub Action that works with any stack — here's how
item.description: The problem Every time I clone a repo, I have to figure out how to run it. Go project? go test ./... — unless it uses make test Node project? npm test — unless it uses pnpm or yarn or bun Rust?...

item.title: Code Review When Half the Diffs Are From Agents
item.description: Code review was invented for a world in which a human wrote each diff, slowly, and another human read it, also slowly. The ratio held. Reviewers could plausibly read every line of every change...

item.title: VibeCoding State-of-the-Art-Driven Development (SOTA-DD)
item.description: VibeCoding State-of-the-Art-Driven Development (SOTA-DD) é uma metodologia de desenvolvimento de software baseada em uma mudança simples, mas brutal: o programador moderno não precisa mais gastar...

item.title: How I Blocked 90% of Bot Requests on My Free TikTok Downloader Using Cloudflare Turnstile and PHP
item.description: I launched TikRapid — a free TikTok video downloader — and within the first few days the API was getting hammered. Not by real users. By bots. The problem with free download tools is obvious in...

item.title: Jules: Google's Async Coding Agent Is Changing How We Think About AI and Software Development
item.description: There's a quiet architectural shift happening in how we build software, and it doesn't look like what most people expected. We've spent the last two years treating AI like a very fast autocomplete...

item.title: ChatGPhish Vulnerability Turns ChatGPT Web Summaries Into a Phishing Surface
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a vulnerability in OpenAI ChatGPT that leverages the artificial intelligence (AI) assistant's implicit trust in Markdown links and images to...

item.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
item.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example...

item.title: Tech companies desperately want to film you doing chores
item.description: This week, an AI training startup called Shift said it would clean New Yorkers' homes for free. It has plans to expand into other cities as well, including London, and looking around my flat, I...

item.title: 11 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
item.description: Gemini Omni & Gemini 3.5 hero

item.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-aqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
item.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted...

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 high school graduation gift guide
item.description: High school graduation is a time of change that might be felt more deeply by family members than by the grads themselves. While some grads may immediately embark on a career path, many continue...

item.title: Microsoft delays Fable (again) to avoid GTA VI
item.description: Microsoft has delayed its upcoming Fable reboot once again. The game was set to launch in autumn 2026, but Microsoft now says that Fable will come out in February 2027. However, it will show a...

item.title: We Asked the ‘Future of Truth’ Author to Explain How He Used AI. It Didn’t Go Well
item.description: A book about how AI shapes perceptions of reality came under fire for using AI-generated quotes. Its problems go beyond that.

item.title: Microsoft teases new Surface hardware and ‘a new era of PC’
item.description: I pondered the other day what's next for Microsoft's Surface PC lineup, and it looks like we're about to find out. Windows and Surface chief Pavan Davuluri has just teased "something new is coming...

item.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
item.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

item.title: The Vatican’s Man Inside Anthropic
item.description: Pope Leo XIV may not be able to disarm AI, but he’s got the attention of the industry.

item.title: Trump’s mass deportations are only possible with racial profiling
item.description: Border security czar Tom Homan keeps threatening to "flood" New York City with ICE agents. But a new investigation shows that ICE has been quietly ramping up arrests in the New York area already -...

item.title: At $549, Lenovo’s Legion Go S gaming handheld is suddenly a good deal
item.description: This week, the Steam Deck OLED with 512GB of storage went from $549 to $789, putting it even further out of reach for those who were considering getting one as they came back in stock after months...

item.title: You can buy two of Anker’s Qi2 wireless chargers for under $25
item.description: If you’re looking for a fast iPhone or AirPods charger that’s easy to toss into your purse, backpack, or carry-on, Anker’s Zolo Magnetic Wireless Charger is a smart pick. It’s tiny and comes with...

item.title: Attackers Use LLM Agent for Post-Exploitation After Marimo CVE-2026-39987 Exploit
item.description: An unknown threat actor has been observed using a large language model (LLM) agent to conduct post-compromise actions after obtaining initial access following the exploitation of a...

item.title: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Submit your session topic before today ends for a chance to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Apply now to share your insight and help shape the conversations defining the tech industry.

item.title: Final 24 hours to save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
item.description: You now have until tonight at 11:59 p.m. PT to lock in Early Bird savings of up to $410 for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 before prices increase. Join 10,000+ tech leaders in October for one of the most...

item.title: How Ferrari bungled the design of its first EV
item.description: For nearly 80 years, Ferrari occupied a unique cultural space where its cars were aspirational, even for people who resented those who could afford them. The price, the exclusivity, and the...

item.title: What would you be willing to put in your body?
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in...

item.title: Kiwibit’s AI-powered bird feeder is my new backyard buddy
item.description: If you're looking for a fun way to connect with nature while collecting bird species on an app like Pokémon, give this smart feeder a try.
